data.body: Design exploration: Define what the homepage looks like — layout, sections, visual hierarchy, composition. Ground every decision in Asimov analysis (research/01) and Julianna's visual language (research/03 §1-2). Deliverable: design direction document with wireframes + visual decisions. Gate: Julianna reviews and approves before homepage build proceeds. Key refs: research/01, research/03, brand-guide.md.

Reopened: wireframe was completed by agent without human review. Julianna needs to review and approve the visual concept before any homepage implementation begins. Plan file exists at .lattice/plans/ but needs human sign-off.
